title: Himax Technologies, Inc. Declares Cash Dividend for FY2025
author: Globe Newswire
description: Himax Technologies (NASDAQ: HIMX) announced a cash dividend of 25.2 cents per ADS (12.6 cents per ordinary share) for fiscal year 2025, with a 100% payout ratio reflecting the company's healthy balance sheet and positive cash flow outlook. The dividend will be paid on July 10, 2026 to shareholders of record as of June 30, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a substantial dividend with a 100% payout ratio, indicating strong profitability and confidence in future cash generation. Management's positive outlook on growth in key business areas (WLO and LCoS) and commitment to shareholder returns through dividends and buybacks demonstrates financial health and shareholder-friendly capital allocation.

title: Himax Technologies, Inc. Declares Cash Dividend for FY2025
author: Na
description: Himax Technologies declared a cash dividend of 25.2 cents per ADS (12.6 cents per ordinary share) for 2025, representing a 100% payout ratio of last year's profit. The dividend will be paid on July 10, 2026 to shareholders of record as of June 30, 2026. CEO Jordan Wu highlighted the company's healthy balance sheet, positive cash flow outlook, and in-house manufacturing capacity in WLO and LCoS segments to support anticipated growth.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a substantial 100% payout ratio dividend, indicating strong profitability and confidence in future cash generation. Management expressed positive outlook for growth in key business segments (WLO and LCoS) with existing manufacturing capacity in place. The consistent dividend policy since 2006 IPO demonstrates shareholder-friendly capital allocation and financial health.

title: Questex’s Sensors Converge and EDGE AI FOUNDATION Announce Expanded Second-Year Partnership for 2026 Event
author: Not Specified
description: Questex's Sensors Converge and the EDGE AI FOUNDATION have expanded their partnership for the 2026 event (May 5-7) at Santa Clara Convention Center. The collaboration will feature an enlarged EDGE AI FOUNDATION Pavilion, a keynote address by EDGE AI FOUNDATION CEO Pete Bernard on 'How Edge AI Will Save the World,' and an expert panel on edge AI deployment in autonomous systems. The event will showcase 200+ exhibitors, 100+ speakers, and 50+ educational sessions focused on edge AI technologies and intelligent systems.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Confirmed as exhibitor in expanded EDGE AI FOUNDATION Pavilion, gaining visibility and networking opportunities with engineers, architects, and investors at major industry event.
Confirmed as exhibitor in expanded pavilion, positioning company in front of target audience for edge AI and embedded systems solutions.
Confirmed exhibitor at major industry event focused on AI-enabled sensing platforms and real-time processing, aligning with company's core technology offerings.

title: Himax Industry-Leading OLED Touch IC Enters Mass Production for IT Applications Elevating the Integrated Display and Touch Experience
author: Himax Technologies, Inc.
description: Himax Technologies announced that its HX85200 series on-cell OLED touch controller IC has been adopted by multiple leading global IT brands and is entering mass production in Q1 2026. The advanced touch controller features differential signal processing and algorithms to deliver accurate multi-finger capacitive touch performance while minimizing touch-display interference across various OLED panel architectures, including rigid, flexible, and hybrid types. The IC is available in 138-channel and 118-channel configurations optimized for laptop PCs and tablet devices respectively.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced successful adoption of its advanced OLED touch controller IC by multiple leading global IT brands with mass production beginning in Q1 2026. This represents significant commercial traction in the high-end OLED display market, demonstrating technological leadership and expanding market opportunities in growing IT applications.

title: Himax is Powering the Next Generation of Intelligent Devices in CES 2026 Showcase Featuring Ultralow Power Always-On AI, Smart Glasses Innovation, and Automotive Display Leadership
author: Himax Technologies, Inc.
description: Himax Technologies will showcase its WiseEye endpoint AI technology, automotive display solutions, and Front-lit LCoS microdisplays at CES 2026. The company highlights ultralow power always-on AI capabilities for smart glasses, security systems, and AI PCs, with partnerships including AUO and Vuzix for AR glasses demonstrations.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company is showcasing comprehensive technology portfolio across multiple growth markets (AI, automotive, AR/VR), demonstrating market leadership in automotive displays, expanding WiseEye AI adoption with major customers, and announcing strategic partnerships. The breadth of innovations and customer collaborations indicate strong market positioning and future growth potential.

AUO is partnering with Himax for live AR glasses demonstrations at CES 2026, indicating collaboration on next-generation display technology and market opportunity in the emerging smart glasses segment.

Vuzix is collaborating with Himax for live demonstrations of LCoS microdisplay solutions for AR glasses, suggesting product readiness and market validation for next-generation smart glasses applications.
